must_detect.matched_text:
Parties: Novaphera Materials SE (issuer listed on the Albion Continental Exchange) to acquire Solentis Data GmbH; bridge financing by Lanterra Capital SICAF (Member State L).
Consideration: €145,000,000 cash on completion plus €20,000,000 earn-out; financing via €90,000,000 senior secured notes and €25,000,000 revolving facility.
Conditions: board and shareholder approvals; antitrust clearance in Member State D; MAR procedures and insider list readiness; CSRD double-materiality assessment; SFDR pre-contractual update for Article 8 classification.
MAR workflow: this draft is non-public but not classified as inside information until binding SPA; ad hoc disclosure assessment to be made at signing; closed-period dealings prohibited for wall-crossed staff.
Issuer to maintain project insider lists for all wall-crossed persons; Mr. Teo Marin (Head of IR) to manage notifications and cleansing post-announcement.
Schedule 3 (DPA): no special-category data under GDPR Art 9 will be transferred to the VDR; where unavoidable, explicit consent is collected and records of processing are maintained.
Data-export approval: cross-border transfer of limited HR metadata to Processor Peregrine Pay Ltd in Third Country X is approved under SCC Module 2, with encryption-at-rest and transfer impact assessment filed.
Data minimisation: onboarding forms restrict KYC to internal participant IDs and business contact details only; VDR logs retained 6 months; transaction books retained 10 years per Member State A law, then scheduled for erasure.
DSAR: investor request INV-447 for access to marketing contact data was fulfilled on 02 May 2026, with erasure of obsolete records confirmed and ticket closed.
Consent withdrawal: employee JL-993 withdrew consent for wellness programme data on 05 June 2026; special-category fields were erased and processing stopped; no further action required.
Completed control: no ongoing cross-border transfers of special-category data are in scope for this transaction; prior exports concluded in Q1 2026 and deletion certificates are on file.
Sustainability undertakings: buyer to publish pro-forma CSRD KPIs within 4 months post-close; Lanterra Capital to receive SFDR PAIs for the combined group quarterly.
Financial covenants: leverage cap at 3.0x; negative pledge and dividend stopper until net leverage <2.0x; customary events of default.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
